products.title: PACKISM Clear Bag for Stadium Events - Clear Purses for Women Transparent Crossbody Messenger Bag for Concerts Game Day
bullets: Extra Large Capacity: Measures 9 x 3.9 x 12 inches; significantly larger than standard mini clear bags; spacious enough to hold all your stadium essentials (phone, keys, wallet, tickets, mini power bank, sunglasses, and lipstick) and fits your day-trip comforts like a notebook, fan, and sunscreen. Everything has its place for effortless organization and easy access

Stadium-approved Clear Bag: Designed to maximize the allowable size for most stadiums and venues (typically under 12 x 6 x 12 inches); this clear bag for stadium events helps you get through security quickly without leaving your necessities behind

Adjustable for Any Occasion: Strap range 33-58 inches. Wear it crossbody at 58 inches or shoulder-length at 33 inches; Detach the strap for clutch-style use at baseball games; Switch from day to night with this versatile stadium purse

Long-lasting Water-resistant Design: Shield your phone and wallet with thick PVC material; Handles sudden rain or spilled drinks at tailgates; Clear crossbody bags for women built to survive all-season adventures
More Than Just Game Day: Ace airport security lines with this see through bag; Take it to beach days or Target runs; Great gift for music festival lovers or as a Christmas stocking stuffer
